chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. R.A.No. 83 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection No.12. 2. For hearing of main case. 01.12.2025. Mr. Khalid Hussain Khoso, Advocate for applicant. = Syed Abdul Rasool Shah, Advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of respondent No.2. Counsel submits that he has “No Objection” if this revision is allowed. None present on behalf of the respondent No.1 inspite of notices. No intimation is received. For the reasons to be recorded, the Revision Application is allowed and appellate order dated 03.03.2025 passed by the Additional District Judge-I, Kotri in Civil Appeal No.73/2024 is set aside and the matter is remanded to the appellate Court to decide afresh in accordance with law. JUDGE Tufail
